user.title: Xiaomi Camera
user.description: Connect to go2rtc and log in to Xiaomi Mi Home. The Xiaomi password is only sent to go2rtc during setup.

captcha.title: Xiaomi captcha
captcha.description: go2rtc requested a captcha. Open the go2rtc Xiaomi login page if the image is not visible here. Captcha data: `{captcha}`

verify.title: Xiaomi verification
verify.description: Enter the Xiaomi verification code sent to `{verify_hint}`.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to go2rtc or create the camera stream.
error.no_cameras: No Xiaomi cameras were found for this account and region.

abort.already_configured: This Xiaomi account and region are already configured.
abort.no_accounts: go2rtc did not return a Xiaomi account after login.
